description_long: This shelter is a two-story, rectangular structure with a weathered, industrial appearance. The upper level is clad in aged wooden planks and features a flat, rusted metal roof with a rectangular skylight and perimeter railing. The lower level is constructed from corrugated metal panels, showing signs of rust and wear, and includes a large ventilation unit and concrete blocks at the base. Access is provided by a wide, external staircase leading to a raised wooden platform, which is bordered by metal railings. The shelter has multiple rectangular windows, some open and some covered, and a prominent, rusted drainage pipe running vertically along one side. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, possibly temporary or repurposed building suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A weathered, two-story shelter with a rusted metal roof, wooden upper walls, and a metal lower section, featuring an external staircase and raised platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, external staircase, and raised platform with metal railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rusted drainage pipe, ventilation unit, and a window on the upper level.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two upper windows, concrete blocks at the base, and the full length of the shelter.
description_view_3: Platform view showing the entry door on the upper level and the open, railed platform extending outward.
attribute_roof_type: flat rusted metal roof with perimeter railing and rectangular skylight
attribute_entryway_design: rectangular open doorway with adjacent wooden steps and covered platform
attribute_support_structure: wooden beams, metal posts, and corrugated metal wall panels
attribute_transparency: fully opaque except for a small glass skylight
